expectations.text: A report.md file was created in the outputs directory
Report correctly identifies this as a dotfiles/stow-based repo
expectations.evidence: Stack section: 'GNU Stow for symlink management', lists all stow packages

expectations.text: Report contains findings from multiple distinct analysis dimensions
expectations.evidence: Findings span Code Health (wt complexity 232), Reliability (error handling), Maintainability (hardcoded paths), Duplication (wsh/wrc), Architecture (model.go), Data Integrity (state locking)

expectations.text: Report includes a 'what's working well' section
expectations.evidence: 'What's Working Well' with 7 items including atomic state management, Go dashboard factoring, install.sh error handling

expectations.text: Findings reference specific file paths as evidence
expectations.evidence: scc complexity scores (232, 102), jscpd clone locations (lines 141-145/149-153), specific line refs throughout
Numbered 1-6 'ranked by impact' with severity labels, Lower Priority section

expectations.text: At least 2 findings include concrete suggestions
expectations.evidence: All findings have 'Direction' field: 'Split into per-command files', 'Extract shared _wb_project_exec() helper', 'Extract rendering into render.go'
